panel_meeting_name: Assessment Sub-group Membership The role of the Assessment Sub-group is to review and score the research and research translation proposals assigned to it by the SARIC Secretariat according to the agreed assessment criteria. Chair Prof Sue Hartley, University of York Academic Members Prof Steve Banwart, University of Sheffield Prof James Brown, John Innes Centre Prof John Crawford, Rothamsted Research Dr Bruce Grieve, University of Manchester Dr Jon Hillier, University of Aberdeen Prof David Jones, University of Bangor Prof Jonathan Leake, University of Sheffield Prof Gail Preston, University of Oxford Dr Ann Bruce, University of Edinburgh
